callDisconnectedAutoRouted: 🚫 Call Disconnected (auto-routed) Wallet: $${walletCheck.usdBal.toFixed(2)} — below $${LOW_BALANCE_TRIGGER} threshold. 💰 Top up at least $${LOW_BALANCE_RESUME} to resume calling.
callDisconnectedWalletInsufficient: 🚫 Call Disconnected — Wallet insufficient (need $${rate}/min + $${CALL_CONNECTION_FEE} connect fee).\nTop up via 👛 Wallet.
callDisconnectedWalletExhausted: 🚫 Call Disconnected — Wallet exhausted.\nTop up via 👛 Wallet.
outboundCallFailedRouting: 🚫 Outbound Call Failed\n📞 ${formatPhone(num.phoneNumber)} → ${formatPhone(destination)}\nReason: Call routing failed. Please try again.
planMinutesExhausted: ⚠️ Plan Minutes Exhausted 📞 ${formatPhone(phoneNumber)} Used: ${used}/${limit} minutes this cycle. Overage billing is now active from your wallet. Top up or upgrade your plan.
orphanedNumberAlert: ⚠️ Orphaned Number Alert 📞 ${to} received inbound call from ${from} ❌ No owner found in DB — call rejected. This number may need to be released or re-assigned.
overageActive: 💰 Overage Active — Plan minutes exhausted. ${chargedStr} (${isUSCanada(destination) ? 'US/CA' : 'Intl'}) from ${deductResult.currency.toUpperCase()} wallet.
callEndedPlanWalletExhausted: 🚫 Call Ended — Plan minutes + wallet exhausted.\n⏱️ ~${elapsedMin} min. Top up wallet or upgrade plan.
testCallsExpired: ⏰ Test Calls Expired Your free SIP test has ended. Please disconnect your SIP client to stop retrying. 💡 To make more calls, purchase a Cloud Phone plan from the main menu.
outboundCallBlocked: 🚫 Outbound Call Blocked\n📞 ${formatPhone(num.phoneNumber)} → ${formatPhone(destination)}\nReason: Number is ${num.status}. Please renew or contact support.
sipCallBlocked: 🚫 SIP Call Blocked — Wallet balance insufficient (need $${sipRate}/min + $${CALL_CONNECTION_FEE} connect fee ${isUSCanada(destination) ? 'US/CA' : 'Intl'}).\nBalance: $${walletCheck.usdBal.toFixed(2)} / NGN: ₦${0}\nOutbound calls are billed from wallet. Top up via 👛 Wallet.
outboundCallFailedTempUnavailable: 🚫 Outbound Call Failed\n📞 ${formatPhone(num.phoneNumber)} → ${formatPhone(destination)}\nReason: Outbound calling is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
lowBalanceForward: ⚠️ Low Balance — $${usdBal.toFixed(2)} (~${estMinutes} min fwd). Top up $25 via 👛 Wallet.
lowBalanceIvrForward: ⚠️ Low Balance — $${usdBal.toFixed(2)} (~${estMinutes} min IVR fwd). Top up via 👛 Wallet.
ivrCallEndedWalletExhausted: 🚫 IVR Call Ended — Wallet exhausted ($${usdBal.toFixed(2)}).\nIVR calls cost $${IVR_CALL_RATE}/min. Top up via 👛 Wallet.
callNotConnected: 📞 Call not connected — the recipient was busy or didn't answer.\n\n🎁 Your free trial call is still available! Try again anytime.
